specialBuffDesc.BR: - Após aplicar <@ba.key>Inflição de Artes</> {dmg_cnt:0} vez(es), todos os operadores ganham DNO Final Causado <@ba.vup>+ {damage_up:0%}</>.
specialBuffDesc.CN: - 造成{dmg_cnt:0}次<@ba.key>法术附着</>后，干员造成的最终伤害<@ba.vup>+{damage_up:0%}</>。
specialBuffDesc.DE: – Nachdem {dmg_cnt:0}-mal <@ba.key>Technikkumulierung</> verursacht wurde, erhalten alle Operatoren zugefügten Finalen SDN <@ba.vup>+{damage_up:0%}</>.
specialBuffDesc.EN: - After applying <@ba.key>Arts Infliction</> {dmg_cnt:0} time(s), all operators gain Final DMG Dealt <@ba.vup>+{damage_up:0%}</>.
specialBuffDesc.FR: - Après avoir appliqué une <@ba.key>altération des Arts</> {dmg_cnt:0} fois, les DÉG finaux infligés par tous les opérateurs augmentent de <@ba.vup>{damage_up:0%}</>.
specialBuffDesc.ID: - Setelah mengakibatkan <@ba.key>Arts Infliction</> sebanyak {dmg_cnt:0} kali, semua operator akan mendapatkan Final DMG Dealt <@ba.vup>+{damage_up:0%}</>.
specialBuffDesc.IT: - Dopo aver applicato <@ba.key>Afflizione da Arti</> {dmg_cnt:0} volta/e, tutti gli operatori ottengono <@ba.vup>+{damage_up:0%}</> di danno finale.
specialBuffDesc.JP: - <@ba.key>アーツ付着</>を{dmg_cnt:0}回付与すると、オペレーターの与える最終ダメージ<@ba.vup>+{damage_up:0%}</>
specialBuffDesc.KR: - <@ba.key>아츠 부착</>을 {dmg_cnt:0}회 부여하면, 오퍼레이터가 주는 최종 피해가 <@ba.vup>+{damage_up:0%}</>.
specialBuffDesc.MX: - Tras aplicar <@ba.key>Imposición de artes</> {dmg_cnt:0} veces, todos los operadores obtienen DAÑ Final infligido <@ba.vup>+{damage_up:0%}</>.
specialBuffDesc.RU: - Если наложить <@ba.key>поражение искусствами</> {dmg_cnt:0} р., итоговый наносимый УРН всех оперативников увеличивается на <@ba.vup>{damage_up:0%}</>.
specialBuffDesc.TC: - 造成{dmg_cnt:0}次<@ba.key>法術附著</>後，幹員造成的最終傷害<@ba.vup>+{damage_up:0%}</>。
specialBuffDesc.TH: หลังจาก​ใช้​<@ba.key>​สถานะ​เวท​</>​ครบ​ {dmg_cnt:0} ครั้ง​ โอเปอเรเตอร์​ทั้งหมด​จะ​ได้รับ​ DMG สุดท้าย​ที่​สร้าง​เพิ่มขึ้น​ <@ba.vup>+{damage_up:0%}</>
specialBuffDesc.VN: - Sau khi áp dụng <@ba.key>Nhiễm Thuật Pháp</> {dmg_cnt:0} lần, tất cả các cán viên nhận <@ba.vup>+{damage_up:0%}</> ST Cuối Gây Ra.

specialBuffDesc.BR: - Após aplicar <@ba.key>Inflição de Artes</> {dmg_cnt:0} vez(es), todos os operadores ganham DNO Final Causado <@ba.vup>+ {damage_up:0%}</>.
